source.title: Intrinsic absorption spectroscopy and related physical quantities of narrow-gap semiconductors Hg1-xCdxTe

edge_definition: photon energy at the turning point where the sharply rising absorption region crosses the comparatively flat intrinsic-absorption region
composition_method: density estimate with electron-beam microprobe spatial audit

temperature_series.source_location: Table I specimen metadata and Figure 2 printed labels

fit_dependency.chu_1983_equation: The 1991 paper derives and validates the Chu empirical equation using this source family; its close residual is not independent validation.
fit_dependency.composition_circularity_boundary: Table I intrinsic-absorption specimens use density and microprobe composition. Separate intrinsic-carrier specimens use Schmit cutoff-derived composition and are excluded from this tranche.

admissible_use: within-specimen thermal-increment transfer screen and observation-class comparison; not a method-free latent-gap fit authority
